title: Winter Pack
description: This texture pack gives Minecraft a wintery atmosphere and enhances the player experience.
body:
![Minecraft logo with snow on it](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/413/757/title.png 'winter pack @ zny games') **WINTER🎄**
Embrace the chill with the Winter Texture Pack for Minecraft Java!
@znygames ### 🗒|DESCRIPTION This pack transforms your game with a beautifully designed winter theme, turning your Minecraft world into a snowy wonderland. The Winter Texture Pack includes numerous user interface modifications, such as a redesigned action bar, inventory, creative mode, and title screen. Each graphic has been meticulously edited to create a cold and snowy environment, enhancing the overall player experience. Step into a wintery atmosphere and enjoy Minecraft like never before with the Winter Texture Pack. New! with this pack: - start screen - options - buttons - gui - hotbar ### 🎞|TRAILER ### 💬|SOCIAL (っ＾▿＾)۶🍸🌟🍺٩(˘◡˘ ) **DISCORD** [▶️ visit me!](https://discord.gg/g6vpenZ4x8) Hey, We invite you to join our Discord community where you can connect with fellow players, share your ideas, and report any bugs you encounter. Whether you have suggestions for improving the hotbar or need support with any issues, our community is here to help. Let’s build, explore, and create together! ### 🖼|EXAMPLE **HOTBAR** **GUI** **START SCREEN** **more examples in the picture gallery above ⬆️** ### 🛈 |INSTALL Note: If you encounter any issues, make sure that the texture pack is compatible with your version of Minecraft, and that you have followed all of the steps correctly.
VANILLA - Open Minecraft: Launch Minecraft and click on the "Options" button. - Go to the "Resource Packs" section: In the options menu, select "Resource Packs" to open the resource packs screen. - Move the texture pack to the correct location: Locate the folder where your Minecraft resource packs are stored. The default location is usually in the "resourcepacks" folder under your Minecraft game directory. Move the downloaded .zip file to this folder. - Select the texture pack in Minecraft: Back in the resource packs screen, select the texture pack that you just moved to the resource packs folder. The texture pack should now be listed in the "Selected Resource Packs" section. - Apply the changes: Click on the "Done" button to apply the changes and enable the texture pack. - Enjoy the new texture pack: Start a new game or load a saved game, and the new texture pack should now be in effect.
### 🔗|BEDROCK VERSION ### 💖| THX! See you in the next pack!
